---
title: "Anurag builds things"
title-block-banner: false
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <style>
        #title-block-header { display: none !important; }
        #quarto-header { display: none !important; }
        .anchorjs-link { display: none !important; }
        .quarto-post.image-right { display: grid !important; grid-template-columns: 140px 1fr !important; }
        .quarto-listing .list .quarto-post:nth-child(odd),
        .quarto-listing .list .quarto-post:nth-child(even) {
          background: transparent !important;
        }
      </style>
listing:
  id: log
  contents: posts
  type: default
  image-align: right
  image-height: "100px"
  sort: "date desc"
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  categories: false
  feed: true
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories]
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}

<!-- ── Masthead with status cells ─────────────────────────── -->
<header class="masthead">
  <div class="masthead-row">
    <div class="brand-block">
      <div class="brand-mark">[A]</div>
      <div class="brand-stack">
        <div class="brand-name">anuragbuildsthings</div>
        <div class="brand-tag">v26 · research log</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="masthead-cells">
      <div class="m-cell">
        <div class="m-label">Now running<span class="pulse"></span></div>
        <div class="m-value">SimCLR · run 8512</div>
      </div>
      <div class="m-cell">
        <div class="m-label">Last updated</div>
        <div class="m-value">18 Apr 2026 · 14:42</div>
      </div>
      <div class="m-cell">
        <div class="m-label">Entries</div>
        <div class="m-value count-target">3 published · 2 drafts</div>
      </div>
      <div class="m-cell">
        <div class="m-label">Cadence</div>
        <div class="m-value">Fortnightly</div>
      </div>
      <div class="m-cell">
        <div class="m-label">Feed</div>
        <div class="m-value"><a href="/index.xml">RSS</a> · <a href="/llms.txt">LLMS</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <nav class="masthead-nav">
      <a href="https://www.youtube.com/@AnuragBuildsThings" aria-label="YouTube">YT</a>
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/mittalanu/" aria-label="LinkedIn">LI</a>
      <a href="https://github.com/anurag4dsb" aria-label="GitHub">GH</a>
      <a href="/about.html">ABOUT</a>
    </nav>
  </div>
</header>

<!-- ── Hero standfirst ────────────────────────────────────── -->
<h1 class="hero-standfirst">
  <span class="line">A research log on</span>
  <span class="line">machine learning systems —</span>
  <span class="line accent">written in public.</span>
</h1>

<p class="hero-dek">
  Every experiment, every note, every YouTube lecture — posted the week it happens.
  No roadmaps. No thought leadership. Just the curves and what they mean.
</p>

<!-- ── Listing section ────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="section-head">
  <div class="filter-chord">
    <button class="chip on" data-cat="all">All</button>
    <button class="chip" data-cat="self-supervised-learning">Self-supervised</button>
    <button class="chip" data-cat="contrastive-learning">Contrastive</button>
    <button class="chip" data-cat="representation-learning">Representation</button>
    <button class="chip" data-cat="augmentations">Augmentations</button>
    <button class="chip" data-cat="computer-vision">Computer vision</button>
    <button class="chip" data-cat="fundamentals">Fundamentals</button>
  </div>
</div>
```

::: {#log}
:::

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
  const log = document.getElementById('listing-log');
  const target = document.querySelector('.count-target');
  if (!log) return;

  function recount () {
    const visible = log.querySelectorAll('.quarto-post:not([style*="display: none"])').length;
    if (target) target.textContent = visible + (visible === 1 ? ' entry' : ' entries');
  }

  function wire () {
    const chips = document.querySelectorAll('.filter-chord .chip');
    const posts = log.querySelectorAll('.quarto-post');
    if (!posts.length) return false;
    chips.forEach(chip => {
      chip.addEventListener('click', () => {
        chips.forEach(c => c.classList.remove('on'));
        chip.classList.add('on');
        const cat = chip.dataset.cat;
        posts.forEach(p => {
          const inline = Array.from(p.querySelectorAll('.listing-category'))
            .map(el => el.textContent.trim().toLowerCase());
          p.style.display = (cat === 'all' || inline.includes(cat)) ? '' : 'none';
        });
        recount();
      });
    });
    recount();
    return true;
  }

  if (!wire()) {
    const obs = new MutationObserver(() => {
      if (wire()) obs.disconnect();
    });
    obs.observe(log, { childList: true, subtree: true });
  }
});
</script>
```
